heading: Decision Memory
subheading: AskBiz remembers every decision and checks back in 6 weeks
titlePlaceholder: What did you decide? e.g. Raised price on Wireless Earbuds by £1.50
saveDecision: Save Decision — AskBiz will check back in 6 weeks
askReviewPrompt: Review my recent business decisions and tell me what the outcomes suggest — what worked and what should I learn from?
noDecisions: No decisions logged yet. Every business decision you log will be reviewed in 6 weeks.
